raw_consumer_statement: My credit card was used for over {$1600.00} in charges from multiple stores that Ive never even been too in my life. I told the credit card company that last I used my card was at a XXXX XXXX XXXX  and then from there for multiple days there were charges at many places that Ive never been too. I believe my credit card was copied because I still have the physical card in my possession. I filed the dispute and after about XXXX weeks of their investigation they told me it was my fault since I still have the credit card in my possession. I tried to talk to someone higher than the dispute customer service but they wont let me. One told me they would reopen my case. Another said that there is nothing I could do. The third time I called they said I could email Citi and ask for my case to be reopened ( which I did and did not hear back ).
